name: supabase-reef
description: Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative. It's a platform of interconnected services — a Go auth server, Elixir realtime engine, TypeScript storage service, and a React dashboard that ties them all together. Shared TypeScript types and a client SDK define the contracts between them.

services.name: Auth
services.description: Go-based authentication and user management server — JWTs, Row Level Security, email/password/magic link/phone/OAuth provider sign-in

services.name: Realtime
services.description: Elixir-based WebSocket engine for ephemeral messages, shared state synchronization, and Postgres change listeners

services.name: Storage
services.description: TypeScript object storage service with multi-protocol support (HTTP, TUS, S3, Iceberg), Postgres metadata, and RLS-based authorization

services.name: Studio
services.description: React/Next.js admin dashboard (apps/studio) with shared type definitions (packages/api-types) and Postgres introspection (packages/pg-meta)

services.name: Client SDK
services.description: TypeScript client SDK providing the unified JavaScript interface to all Supabase services
